error_signature: user got access to my inbox
title: Gmail OAuth credentials allow inbox access to other users
symptom: When sharing Gmail OAuth credentials, other users can access the original user's inbox, leading to privacy concerns.
applies_when: Multiple users accessing the same credentials
not_this_if: Each user has their own OAuth credentials
root_cause: When OAuth credentials are shared among users, the authentication allows access to the original user's Gmail account, which can lead to unintended access to personal data.
fix_steps: Add the following lines to your compose.yaml: environment: - CREDENTIALS_OVERWRITE_ENDPOINT=send-credentials - CREDENTIALS_OVERWRITE_ENDPOINT_AUTH_TOKEN=
Store the OAuth credentials in a separate oauth-credentials.json file in the same directory.
Ensure that users only see Sign in Buttons when creating new credentials, preventing access to sensitive fields.
agent_instruction: Implement the CREDENTIALS_OVERWRITE_ENDPOINT settings in your n8n configuration.
